harness_adjustments: Evaluated epochManager.currentEpochBlock() before vm.expectRevert() so the expected revert applies to the collect call.
Skipped uint256(rcau.minSecondsPerCollection) + 1 seconds before collection so the test respects recurring collection timing.
security_interpretation: The overflow/revert path is reachable under payer-signed extreme terms, but the current result does not prove unauthorized value loss, insolvency, or permanent denial of collection.
next_action: Test whether any non-payer actor or normal-looking agreement update can force the same revert or block honest collection. If not, kill or downgrade this hypothesis.
